attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT
,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG
,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG
,CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
,TRADE_IN_AMT AS TRADE_IN_USD_AMT 
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_COST_USD_AMT
,DD_EXTENDED_QTY
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_USD_AMT
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_USD_AMT
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SERVICE_ITEM_KEY
,SALES_MOTION_CD
,SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT AS DV_ANNUALIZED_NET_USD_AMT
,DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT AS DV_MULTIYEAR_NET_USD_AMT
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_KEY
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT
,BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
,DV_CX_PRODUCT AS DV_CX_PRODUCT_NAME
,'N' AS TRUE_UP_FLG /* ADDED AS PART OF APRIL 10 FY22 RELEASE*/
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
,-999 AS DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,'UNKNOW' AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG 
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD 
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME 
,FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT AS FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT AS MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT AS NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT AS FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT AS MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SERVICES_BOOKINGS 
WHERE DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND ROUND(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,3) <> 0
